title: Grillo's Clothes
description: This mod is focused on allowing the player to wear clothes but without use the armor system allowing you to equip both things at the same time.
body: Didn't you want to wear different clothes without need to change the skin? Then this is your mod  This mod is focused on allowing the player to wear clothes but without use the armor system allowing you to equip both things at the same time. Features: Clothes Custom inventory(to equip the clothes) To-Do: Add a wardrobe to store the clothes!
